{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201725115A40C5D3268E84120061"}"},"total":283},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7410049040624730942","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本十分好看的书，作者笔下的人物姓格十分鲜明，剧情紧凑又带感，令人回味无穷。我当时光看简介就吸引了我。非常推荐♥⊙▽⊙！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725291227,"group_id":"7385121946008046654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便写小说的，写的不好，勿喷","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3pm+VzIvjmqld3GhL2CxbU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/283b736757054d2e94961d2a32969120~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529424&x-signature=HgDwhKBSo05tuddWqvJQrIt4KvE%3D","user_id":"108060179426","user_name":"笙凉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108060179426","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385121946008046654","book_info":{"abstract":"无限流，双男主（攻在第二个副本即第17章出现）
完结过后无法修改前面的错字，还望见谅。
雪原之上，尸山血海，罪魁祸首却不翼而飞。
　　敛雾清醒之时发现自己进入了副本，系统042告诉他，想要离开就得先修补好灵魂。
　　在这里修补灵魂的方法只有一个：通关副本。
　　流通的货币为积分和道具。
　　直播间里，观众们欣赏着修真美人，清清冷冷，却又嗜好甜食。一身血衣，摄人心魄。
　　观众下意识觉得敛雾像个花瓶，适合金屋藏娇。
　　接着长剑出鞘，剑光所过之处，寒冰冻结。
　　【这该不会真的是修真的吧？】
　　敛雾微笑：恭喜你，猜对了。
　　直到副本进入后期，美人突然黑化，大开杀戒，像夺人心魄的恶魔。观众才恍惚觉得，这样的美人是浴血战神。
　　敛雾知道自己灵魂受损，可能会发生不可控的变化，但是清醒之后，面对一片狼藉的副本，他也只能微笑地说声抱歉。
　　不知什么时候开始，一只白凤时不时与他进入同一个副本。
　　系统042时常掉线，悄悄溜回系统大本营和其他系统唠嗑。
　　042：002，咱俩都成难兄难弟了。
　　002：当时就不该负责这个玩家
　　037：别说了，我负责的玩家天天隔你俩那边当灯泡，拉都拉不","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob917687fec1d23b9898598d4798c7580~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清汤配寡水","author_id":"","book_id":"7385121946008046654","book_name":"当修真美人进入无限直播后","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0b0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6087人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385122894159823422","read_count":"6087","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"591764"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"245","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,直播,古代,黑化,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob917687fec1d23b9898598d4798c7580~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182711&x-signature=EJaACeF5veoAozWgY29Q%2BSn8ZCM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2524070104809279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"96"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201725115A40C5D3268E84120061"}"
